title: Claw Artifact Bundle — meta.json
description: Machine-readable metadata for a single claw execution bundle stored at .claws/<id>/meta.json.

id.description: Artifact bundle ID. Must match the containing directory name. Format: YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS-<role>-<lab-slug-safe>.

orientation_id.description: ID of the orientation that spawned this claw. Must match an orientation defined in .studio/orientations.toml.

lab_slug.description: Lab path/slug identifying the lab. May include a kind prefix separated by /.

runtime.description: Runtime adapter used to execute the claw.

capability_profile.description: Capability profile name as defined in .studio/capabilities.toml.

source_scope.description: List of source keys in scope for this claw run. Keys must match entries in .studio/sources.toml. May be empty.

status.description: Terminal status of the claw run.

started_at.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp when the claw started.

ended_at.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp when the claw finished.

promotion_recommendation.description: The claw's recommendation to the director. The director makes the final promotion decision.
